name: INTERACT3
fullName: Care Bundle Approach for Acute Intracerebral Haemorrhage
population: n=7036, ≥18, NIHSS n/a, <6 h from onset
teachingPoint: Establishes care-bundle approach for acute ICH.

name: INTERACT2
fullName: Rapid Blood-Pressure Lowering in Acute Intracerebral Hemorrhage
teachingPoint: Supports early BP reduction in ICH; ordinal benefit despite a negative dichotomous primary.

name: ATACH-2
fullName: Intensive Blood-Pressure Lowering in Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage
teachingPoint: More intensive target (<140) gave no benefit and more renal AEs — avoid overshoot below ~140.
